ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament (e.g., Masters Tournament) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is held */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the tournament */,
  "course_details" TEXT /* Details of the course where the tournament is held */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tournament */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "golfers" (
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golfer */,
  "golfer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the golfer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the golfer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the golfer represents */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current world ranking of the golfer */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Primary sponsor of the golfer */,
  "career_wins" INTEGER /* Number of career wins */,
  "career_earnings" REAL /* Total career earnings */,
  "player_profile" TEXT /* Brief profile of the golfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("golfer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "golfer_tournament_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golfer */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the tournament */,
  "top_25" INTEGER /* Number of top-25 finishes in the tournament */,
  "events_played" INTEGER /* Total number of events played in the tournament */,
  "cuts_made" INTEGER /* Total number of cuts made in the tournament */,
  "total_strokes" INTEGER /* Total number of strokes taken in the tournament */,
  "average_strokes_per_round" REAL /* Average number of strokes per round in the tournament */,
  "best_finish" INTEGER /* Best finish in the tournament */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Total earnings in the tournament */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_golfer_tournament_performance_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_golfer_tournament_performance_golfer_id FOREIGN KEY ("golfer_id") REFERENCES golfers ("golfer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par score for the round */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course where the round is played */,
  "tee_times" TEXT /* Tee times for the round */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_rounds_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "golfer_round_performance" (
  "round_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round performance record */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golfer */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "strokes_taken" INTEGER /* Number of strokes taken in the round */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position after the round */,
  "fairways_hit" INTEGER /* Number of fairways hit in the round */,
  "putts_taken" INTEGER /* Number of putts taken in the round */,
  "greens_in_regulation" INTEGER /* Number of greens hit in regulation in the round */,
  "sand_saves" INTEGER /* Number of sand saves in the round */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties in the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_golfer_round_performance_golfer_id FOREIGN KEY ("golfer_id") REFERENCES golfers ("golfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_golfer_round_performance_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES tournament_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golfer whose performance data is accessed */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament whose performance data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Whether data was downloaded or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_golfer_id FOREIGN KEY ("golfer_id") REFERENCES golfers ("golfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of external data source (e.g., weather, course details) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the external data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golfer */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data integrated (e.g., weather, course details) */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date when the data was last synced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_golfer_id FOREIGN KEY ("golfer_id") REFERENCES golfers ("golfer_id")
)
